title: Production Agent Loop and Goal Capstone · State Clinic: Architecture Choice
summary: Build a safe goal-driven agent for a realistic repository or operations task. Planned artifact: Add and verify the loops architecture choice increment in a production-ready agent-loop reference implementation. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Choose workflow or agent patterns and justify complexity from task uncertainty.
Expose current phase, next wake condition, authority, costs, and safe interventions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
